caption: The video features a woman sitting in what appears to be a podcast studio, as indicated by the "Boss Talk 101" logo and text visible on the screen. She is wearing headphones and a black t-shirt with the same "Boss Talk 101" branding. The woman is positioned in front of a microphone, suggesting she is either hosting or participating in a podcast episode. Her hair is styled in an updo, and she seems focused, possibly listening to someone off-camera or preparing to speak. In the background, there is a television screen displaying the name "Johnson," which might be related to the content of the podcast. The setting includes a white wall and a black door with a yellow frame, contributing to a professional yet casual atmosphere typical of podcast recordings.
